title: Orchestrator State
description: Repo-local schema for artifacts/orchestration/orchestrator-state.json. Defines the remediation_loop shape required by issue #25 (Remediation Loop Protocol).

remediation_loop.description: Remediation cycle state. Present whenever a remediation cycle has been started.

current_cycle.description: 1-based index of the cycle currently in progress or most recently completed.

cycles.description: Sequential list of remediation cycles. The Nth cycle (0-based) corresponds to current_cycle == N+1.

entry_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 yyyy-MM-ddTHH-mm timestamp at cycle entry.

exit_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 yyyy-MM-ddTHH-mm timestamp at cycle exit; null while the cycle is still in progress.

inputs_path.description: Path to remediation-inputs.<entry-ts>.md authored by the orchestrator.

plan_path.description: Path to remediation-plan.<entry-ts>.md authored by atomic-planner. Required; an empty string is a malformed cycle.

blocking_count.description: Total FAIL + blocking-PARTIAL findings across the three reaudit artifacts; null until reaudit completes.

exit_condition_met.description: True only when blocking_count == 0; null until the exit gate runs.

allOf.description: Exit-gate invariant: exit_condition_met == true requires blocking_count == 0.
Execution-without-cleared-preflight invariant: any non-not_started execution_status requires preflight.final_status == 'clear'.

iterations.description: Number of preflight passes that ran for this cycle.

final_status.description: Most recent preflight outcome for this cycle.
